mapper.select: SELECT * FROM scheduled_tasks ORDER BY builtin DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM scheduled_tasks WHERE task_type = #{taskType} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM scheduled_tasks WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT * FROM scheduled_tasks WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT last_insert_rowid()
INSERT INTO scheduled_tasks (task_name, task_type, cron_expression, enabled, description, ext_params, user_id, agent_id, builtin) VALUES (#{taskName}, #{taskType}, #{cronExpression}, #{enabled}, #{description}, #{extParams}, #{userId}, #{agentId}, #{builtin})
mapper.update: UPDATE scheduled_tasks SET task_name = #{taskName}, task_type = #{taskType}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, ext_params = #{extParams}, user_id = #{userId}, agent_id = #{agentId}, builtin = #{builtin}, update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE id = #{id}
